rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees After Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CURTIS DOWLING and DOWLING & MARQUEZ LLP's Motion For Attorney'S Fees After Appeal DENIED without prejudice. Defendants to provide supplemental briefing. Defendants have failed to provide the breakdown of hours and tasks related to the special motion to strike. (Code Civ. Proc. sect. 425.16) (See e.g., Dowling Declaration 13-14.)= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Laura Contreras' Motion For Sanction Against Defendants Curtis Dowling And Dowling & Marquez, Llp
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2017 line 1. Plaintiff Laura Contreras' Motion For Sanction Against Defendants Curtis Dowling And Dowling & Marquez, Llp DENIED. A stay on all discovery proceedings remains in effect until notice of entry of the order ruling on a special motion to strike. (Code Civ. Proc. sect. 425.16.) The California Court of Appeal has recently reversed the trial court's decision denying defendant Dowling's special motion to strike and the trial court has not yet issued or entered a new order granting defendant's motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 17, 2017 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT SEAN SOLWAY's DEMURRER to 2ND Amended CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Cross-Complainant sufficiently states a cause of action.= (501/REQ)
